title: Dyeable Color Variants
description: A Datapack to re-color any color-variant vanilla block
body:
# Dyeable Color Variants
is a datapack which adds the possibility to re-color any colored block

All it needs is 8 of your desired dye then you can recolor any of
* Wool
* Carpets
* Concrete Powders
* Concrete
* Terracotta
* Glazed Terracotta
* Stained Glass
* Stained Glass Pane
* Candles
* Beds
* Banners   

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HNcribmz/images/b88a08c7151d624d908a3906c3c75306db88c110.png)
